messages.content: Generate web-search queries to verify or refute market-risk hypotheses. Queries must contain concrete entities (directive names, vendor names, country + year), never topic words. Each risk gets one CONFIRMING query, one FALSIFYING query (search for what would disconfirm — derived from the falsifier field), and one BASE-RATE/analog query where useful.

content: {"items":[{"riskId":"risk.base-rate-analogy.som-window-cumulative-misread","queries":[{"query":"Prospeo SOM benchmark \"1-3 years\" serviceable obtainable market revenue capture","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"Tractian first year revenue \"$200,000\" OR \"$200K\" industrial hardware startup","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"industrial hardware startup data center infrastructure first 12 months 1% SAM revenue case study","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.base-rate-analogy.prelet-lockin-serviceable-window","queries":[{"query":"data center transformer lead time 2024 2025 \"48 months\" OR \"60 months\" procurement","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"rack PDU RFQ 2026 Europe colocation vendor qualification during tender CE certification","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"hyperscale data center procurement cycle \"4 to 7 years\" electrical equipment lock-in","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.base-rate-analogy.framework-foreclosure-beachhead","queries":[{"query":"Digital Realty Schneider Electric $373 million framework agreement PDU power","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"Frankfurt Amsterdam colocation hyperscale open multi-vendor rack PDU RFQ 2026","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"data center power equipment vendor market share CR3 concentration Schneider Vertiv Eaton","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.base-rate-analogy.channel-calendar-lockout","queries":[{"query":"Vertiv Greenergy distributor line card partner program annual review certification requirement","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"new entrant vendor added distributor line card same year no prior certification data center hardware","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"Legrand MIND Park integrator vendor selection DCIM compatibility branded incumbent case study","kind":"base-rate"}]},{"riskId":"risk.base-rate-analogy.poc-acceptance-reversal","queries":[{"query":"industrial IoT hardware pilot deployment acceptance rate \"30%\" rollback return rate","kind":"confirming"},{"query":"intelligent PDU pilot deployment successful customer acceptance DCIM integration case study 2024 2025","kind":"falsifying"},{"query":"data center hardware pilot to production conversion rate industry benchmark failure rate","kind":"base-rate"}]}]}
